label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes column 0x08 (MonotonicTime) on a Log row and receives SUCCESS, but the provided Log source says MonotonicTime SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host. A SUCCESS response is therefore not protocol-compliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes column 0x0D (Data) on a Log row and receives SUCCESS, but the provided Log source says Data SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host. A SUCCESS response is therefore not protocol-compliant.
